title: verbascum × fridae
intro: Verbascum × fridae is a hybrid plant, resulting from the cross between Verbascum phoeniceum and Verbascum sinuatum, also known as mullein and verbascum respectively. It is a flowering plant that has been utilized for its medicinal properties, particularly for its soothing and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is known for its potential health benefits, including relief from respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Verbascum × fridae are often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to promote relaxation and reduce inflammation.
